# Explore More — e-bike rental in Sovata, Romania

> Explore More rents premium electric mountain bikes in Sovata (Mureș county,
> Transylvania, Romania). Ride to Bear Lake (Lacul Ursu), the salt hills and the
> forest trails around town. Helmet and lock are included with every rental, and
> an optional local tour guide is available. Booking is by phone or WhatsApp.

## Business details

- Name: Explore More
- Type: Bicycle rental service (electric mountain bikes / e-bikes)
- Location: Str. Câmpul Mic 57, 545500 Sovata, Mureș, Romania
- Coordinates: 46.6036, 25.0941
- Phone / WhatsApp: +40 753 538 524
- Website: https://exploremore.ro
- Hours: daily 09:00–19:00
- Languages spoken: Romanian, Hungarian, English
- Service area: Sovata and the surrounding area — Praid, Corund, Sângeorgiu de Pădure
- Bear Lake (Lacul Ursu), the salt hills and the forest trails are all rideable
  directly from the shop; the bikes' pedal assist handles the hilly terrain easily.

## Prices (RON / lei)

- 1 hour — 80 lei
- 2 hours — 120 lei
- 3 hours — 150 lei
- Whole day — 180 lei
- Optional local tour guide — 200 lei flat rate per tour
- Included with every rental: helmet and lock

## Frequently asked questions

- Where can I rent an e-bike in Sovata? At Explore More, Str. Câmpul Mic 57,
  545500 Sovata (Mureș, Romania). Reserve by phone or WhatsApp on +40 753 538 524,
  or drop by during opening hours (daily 09:00–19:00), subject to availability.
- How much does it cost? Electric mountain bike rental is 80 lei for 1 hour,
  120 lei for 2 hours, 150 lei for 3 hours, or 180 lei for the whole day. An
  optional local tour guide is 200 lei flat per tour. Helmet and lock are included.
- Can I ride to Bear Lake (Lacul Ursu)? Yes — Bear Lake, the salt hills and the
  forest trails around Sovata are all reachable directly from the shop on the e-bike.
- Do I need to book in advance? No app or online booking needed — just call or
  message on WhatsApp to reserve, or drop by subject to availability.
- Is it hard to ride an electric bike? No. The pedal assist makes the hills easy
  and it rides like a normal bike; we give a quick run-through before you set off.
- How far can I go on a single charge? Roughly 30–40 km on hilly terrain, and up
  to 50–60 km with a little care. Every bike starts fully charged.
- How do I pay? On the spot, by cash or card, when you pick up the bike.

## Pages

- [Home (English)](https://exploremore.ro/): overview, prices, gallery, contact
- [Prices](https://exploremore.ro/#prices): all rental tiers and the tour-guide add-on
- [FAQ](https://exploremore.ro/#faq): booking, range, payment and riding questions
- [Română](https://exploremore.ro/ro/): versiunea în limba română
- [Magyar](https://exploremore.ro/hu/): magyar nyelvű változat

## Contact & social

- Phone / WhatsApp: +40 753 538 524
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EbikeSovata
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/6pa9cu872GNFA6NK7
